# No Such Machine / Wuci-Ji

Site: https://nosuchmachine.net/
Repository: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji
WuciOS v2.4: https://nosuchmachine.net/wucios.html

Public brand:
No Such Machine

Project surface:
Wuci-Ji / 无此机

Official assets:

- https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/no-such-machine-official-emblem.svg
- https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/no-such-machine-official-emblem.jpg
- https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/no-such-machine-official-banner.jpg

Current public focus:
WuciOS v2.4 Reduction Gate.

Public evidence surface:
Wuci-Ji v2 / Aperture Bastion.

Daylight v20 public challenge poster:
https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/daylight-v20-public-challenge-780thc.jpg

Daylight declaration state:
declaration_allowed = false

WuciOS v2.4 is a reduction-controlled, evidence-bound operating environment
organized around Noether Core, Birkhoff Bastion, Tarski Review Appliance, and
Euclid Substrate Trial.

Current status:

- local evidence only
- Alpine selected for WuciOS v2.4 substrate trial scope only
- WuciOS v2.4 Alpine Substrate Trial Score: 96.0 / 100.0
- Alpine trial artifact SHA-256: 95f3cb750357eeb2cd840ddfc7b62c6addf08b2d66079871a4d8e8efdd9ae45f
- Raw runtime evidence remains local/ignored unless separately authorized
- Gate 16 prepared the PR/merge consideration packet for reviewer/status documentation only
- Void remains one preserved historical candidate, not the selected substrate
- Noether Core is GUI-free
- Birkhoff Bastion is optional
- Tarski Review Appliance generates the review packet
- Phase 2B expands safe build feasibility probes to Buildroot, Alpine, Debian minimal, Void, NixOS, Guix, Yocto, and OpenBSD reference
- Phase 3A defines controlled build rooms and backend readiness without executing builds
- WuciOS v2.4 docs: docs/wucios/v2.4/pr-merge-consideration-packet.md and docs/wucios/v2.4/gate-status-ledger.md
- missing measurements are NOT_MEASURED

Validation handles:

- make wucios-validate
- make wucios-fluff-audit
- make wucios-substrate-matrix
- make wucios-euclid-buildrooms-phase-3a
- make wucios-review
- make site-validate

Non-claims:

- not production cryptography
- not runtime sandboxing
- not host-cleanliness proof
- not whole-system post-quantum safety
- not FIPS validation
- not government validation
- not external certification
- not full runtime validation
- not bootability validation
- not operational deployment approval
- not independent audit completion
- not production authority
